title: cleidion papuanum
intro: Cleidion papuanum, also known as the Papuan cleidion, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cleidion papuanum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies, including ointments and creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
